title: Tests: searchArticles query construction
description: Add a new test file AggregatorAppTests/SearchArticlesTests.swift following the naming convention of existing query-construction tests (e.g. ArticleDecodingTests.swift). Cover: (1) q and limit are always present; (2) cursor appears only when provided; (3) no sort/view/unread_only items emitted; (4) multi-word query is correctly percent-encoded (e.g. 'open ai' → 'q=open%20ai'); (5) empty or whitespace-only query does not invoke searchArticles (guard lives in the view's debounce task or a helper — test at whichever layer the guard is implemented). Use the same mock/stub network layer pattern already established in the test suite.
acceptance_criteria: Test target compiles and all new tests pass
q and limit are verified present on every call
cursor is verified absent when nil, present when provided
No sort, view, or unread_only params appear in any test scenario
Percent-encoding test confirms 'open ai' encodes q correctly
Empty-query guard test confirms no network call is made
